# Palm Bay Lots-Land | Vahid Rajabian Real Estate

> Palm Bay, Florida's largest private lot inventory. Residential lots, commercial land, industrial parcels, and multifamily properties throughout Brevard County. Owner financing available since 2003. Licensed Florida Real Estate Broker Associate — M. David Moallem, Inc.

## About

Vahid Rajabian is a licensed Florida Real Estate Broker Associate with M. David Moallem, Inc., specializing in vacant land and lot sales in Palm Bay and Brevard County, Florida since 2003. With over 2,200 residential lots in inventory — 583 currently active — and significant commercial, industrial, and multifamily holdings, this is one of the largest private lot inventories in Brevard County. Owner financing is available on most residential lots: 25% down, 10% APR, up to 10 years, no prepayment penalty, no bank required.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://palmbaylots-land.com): Overview of Palm Bay lots and land for sale, owner financing, and services
- [Residential Lot Inventory](https://palmbaylots-land.com/inventory): Search 583+ residential lots by location, size, and utility availability throughout Palm Bay
- [Commercial & Investment Listings](https://palmbaylots-land.com/listings): Commercial, industrial, multifamily, and assemblage properties in Palm Bay and Brevard County
- [About Vahid Rajabian](https://palmbaylots-land.com/about): 20+ years experience, credentials, and market expertise
- [Price Guide & Financing Terms](https://palmbaylots-land.com/price-guide): Owner financing calculator, terms, and pricing by unit and lot size
- [Sell Your Land](https://palmbaylots-land.com/sell-your-land): Free land value assessment for Palm Bay lot owners, wholesaler warning information
- [Contact](https://palmbaylots-land.com/contact): Direct contact — 321-333-7230 | vahid@palmbayland.com

## Blog & Educational Content

- [Is Palm Bay a Good Investment in 2026?](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/palm-bay-investment-2026): Market analysis, Space Coast employment, population growth drivers
- [How to Buy Land in Palm Bay With No Bank — Owner Financing Explained](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/owner-financing-guide): Step-by-step owner financing process, terms, sample payment calculator
- [Cost to Build a Home in Palm Bay 2026](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/build-on-land-palm-bay): Full cost breakdown — land, permits, construction, utilities, landscaping
- [Palm Bay Residential Zoning — RS-1, RS-2, RS-3, Corner Lots & Pie-Shaped Lots](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/palm-bay-zoning-residential): Setbacks, lot sizes, corner lot rules, pie-shaped lot guide
- [Palm Bay Commercial, Industrial & Multifamily Zoning — NC, CC, HC, GC, RM, IU, HI](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/palm-bay-zoning-commercial): Full commercial and industrial zoning guide for investors and developers
- [City Water vs. Well & Septic in Palm Bay — Honest 2026 Comparison](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/septic-vs-sewer-palm-bay): Cost comparison, advantages, utility availability by area
- [Understanding Flood Zones in Palm Bay](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/flood-zones-palm-bay): FEMA zones explained, elevation and septic fill rule, buildability
- [The Compound Palm Bay — What Current Lot Owners Need to Know](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/compound-lot-owners): Port Malabar Units 51-53, infrastructure status, assessment information for sellers
- [The Compound Palm Bay — Why Buyers Are Looking at Units 51, 52 & 53](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/compound-buyers): EPA study, brownfields grant, investment opportunity, FPL power extension
- [Florida Property Tax Elimination 2027 — What Palm Bay Buyers Need to Know](https://palmbaylots-land.com/blog/florida-property-tax-2027): HJR 203 facts, what passed, what still needs to happen, Palm Bay impact
